title: Oairse 6 PCS Christmas Picks 17.7" Candy Cane Twig Stems Red & White Candy Cane Sprays for Christmas Tree Decorations, Holiday Centerpieces, Wreaths & Festive Floral Arrangements
features: Whimsical Candy Cane & Swirl Design: These christmas candy cane picks feature a playful mix of red-and-white striped candy canes and spiral shapes, capturing the festive charm of classic holiday sweets. As candy cane christmas decorations, they add a cheerful, nostalgic touch to trees, wreaths, or tablescapes, making them ideal candy christmas ornaments for a whimsical holiday setup.

17.7" Size & 6-Pack Quantity for Versatile Styling: Each spray measures 17.7 inches (45 cm) tall, and with 6 pieces in the set, there’s ample quantity to decorate large trees, multiple wreaths, or various spaces. Use them as christmas tree picks to fill out branches, as candy cane christmas tree decorations, or as accents in holiday centerpieces—they create a cohesive, festive look throughout your home.

DIY-Stylable & Bendable Construction: The stems are designed to be fully bendable and shapeable, allowing you to customize the look after delivery. Whether you prefer curly, twisted, or structured arrangements, these christmas candy cane picks adapt to your vision, making them perfect for personalized candy cane christmas decorations that stand out.

Premium Material Blend for Durability & Texture: Crafted with soft, yarn materials that mimic the look of plush candy, these picks feature sturdy yet flexible stems. They resist fading, bending, and damage, ensuring their vibrant red-and-white colors and shapes stay intact for repeated use in candy cane christmas decorations season after season.

Versatile for Multiple Holiday Decor Scenarios: These candy christmas ornaments work seamlessly in various setups—insert them into christmas trees as tree picks, weave them into wreaths, or use them as standalone accents on mantels or in floral arrangements. Their design fits both traditional and modern holiday themes, adding a sweet touch wherever they’re placed.

Easy to Use & Store for Year-After-Year Enjoyment: Simply insert these candy cane christmas tree decorations into your desired decor piece—no assembly needed. When the season ends, they store easily without losing shape, so you can enjoy their festive charm for many holidays to come, making them a hassle-free addition to your candy cane christmas decorations collection.
